meta.title: Contact
meta.description: Reach Tailored.sa to discuss branding, content, strategy, UX writing, or web development.

intro.title: Tell us what the brand needs next.
intro.description: Use the direct channels below for a quick conversation, or share your brief through the form so we can understand the project shape.

methods.label: WhatsApp
methods.description: Best for fast introductions and early direction.

methods.label: Phone
methods.description: Useful when the scope is easier to explain in conversation.

methods.label: Email
methods.description: Ideal when you want to share context, goals, and timing clearly.

methods.label: Location
methods.description: Rooted in the Eastern Province and working with brands across the region.

form.title: Project brief
form.description: This form is included in the interface for v1. Submission handling can be wired in the next phase without changing the layout.
form.note: This v1 form is currently a presentation stub. Live submission can be connected later.

location.title: A Saudi studio with a regional point of view.
location.description: Tailored.sa began in the Eastern Province and works with businesses that need stronger digital identity, clearer messaging, and more considered brand expression.
